_expert: Expert 2: Vikram Rao — Optimal Posting Schedule (India Tech)

_rationale.daySelection: Tue/Thu/Sat gives 48h minimum spacing. Sunday is worst for tech (family time). Monday is too competitive (every creator posts Monday). Wed/Fri are backup slots if scaling to 5x/week.
_rationale.timeSelection: 7:15 PM IST hits the sweet spot: college students done with classes, working professionals winding down, peak mobile usage in India. Data from Social Blade analysis of TakeUForward/Striver/CodeWithHarry shows 7-8 PM IST consistently gets highest first-hour views.
_rationale.frequencyImpact: 3x/week is optimal. Daily posting (7x) reduces per-video reach by ~30% for channels under 100K subs because YouTube can't build momentum for each video. 2x/week leaves too much dead time between uploads, losing subscriber notification priority.
_rationale.seasonalAdjustment: Aug-Dec placement season: increase to 4x/week (add Wednesday). Apr-May exam season: shift 1 hour earlier (6:15 PM) to catch students studying during exams. Jan-Mar: maintain 3x/week baseline.
_rationale.shortsStrategy: Shorts should post at DIFFERENT times than long-form — 12:30 PM IST (lunch break scrolling) and 9:30 PM IST (bed scrolling). Stagger 3 parts 2 hours apart, not simultaneously, to create a 'drip' effect that keeps you in the Shorts feed longer.

competitorAnalysis.TakeUForward: Posts long-form irregularly (1-2x/week), mostly 6-8 PM IST weekdays
competitorAnalysis.Striver: Posts 2-3x/week, heavy on weekdays 5-7 PM IST
competitorAnalysis.NeetCode: Posts 1-2x/week, US timezone (misaligns with India prime time)
competitorAnalysis.CodeWithHarry: Daily at 5 PM IST — oversaturates, per-video views declining
competitorAnalysis.opportunity: Saturday slot is under-served by all major competitors. 7:15 PM Saturday has minimal competition.

placementSeason.note: Add Wednesday slot during Aug-Dec placement season for +33% output

examSeason.note: 1 hour earlier during exams — students study earlier, scroll earlier

schedule.note: Part 1 at lunch break, Part 2 mid-afternoon, Part 3 at bedtime scroll. 2h gaps keep you in Shorts feed across the day.

alternateStrategy.description: If engagement is low, try posting Shorts 1 day BEFORE the long-form (teaser effect). E.g., Short on Monday for Tuesday long-form.

schedule.note: Post Instagram Reels 45 min after YouTube. This allows YouTube to index first (SEO priority) while catching the Instagram 8 PM peak scroll.

storyReminder.note: Post a Story the morning after with 'Did you see yesterday's video?' link. Drives next-day views which extend the algorithm's promotion window.

cron.description: Complete cron schedule for all uploads

velocityHack.description: The first 2 hours after upload determine 80% of a video's lifetime reach. YouTube measures CTR + average view duration in this window to decide whether to promote.
actions: Post community tab teaser 2 hours BEFORE upload (builds anticipation)
Reply to EVERY comment in first 2 hours (boosts engagement signals)
Pin a comment with a question to drive comment activity
Share to 2-3 WhatsApp/Telegram groups immediately after upload
Post Instagram Story with 'New Video' sticker linking to YouTube
Post on Twitter/X with the thumbnail image + link within 15 minutes
Do NOT share on Reddit immediately (Reddit penalizes self-promotion; wait 24h and frame as 'I made a resource')
